context: Tests understanding of the skill system, agent spawning, and the full optimizer workflow from docs

checklist.name: Skill frontmatter explanation
checklist.description: Correctly explains SKILL.md fields: name (optimize), user-invocable (true), argument-hint, context (fork = isolated), agent (codeflash:optimizer), allowed-tools (Task).

checklist.name: Agent spawning and context
checklist.description: Explains that context: fork creates a separate conversation context, the agent field maps to agents/optimizer.md, and $ARGUMENTS is replaced with user input.

checklist.name: Six-step workflow
checklist.description: Covers all 6 steps: detect runner (lock file priority), verify setup ([tool.codeflash]), verify install (--version), parse prompt (file, function, flags), run codeflash, report results.

checklist.name: CLI flags and command
checklist.description: Shows the correct command with --worktree (always present), --file src/utils.py, --function my_func, --effort high, and mentions the 10-minute timeout (600000ms).
